memory.summary: I'm still planning the assignment analysis, but my close friends are already heading out for lunch. Since relationships matter most, I'll skip the reading and join them now.

desires: Join the lunch with cohort_3 before they disappear to avoid looking like I'm ignoring them, even though it means skipping my reading.
Finish this assignment analysis tonight so I don't have to deal with the stress of it tomorrow or get dragged into a last-minute panic session.
